# Context-filter fixture — used by composer-match-with-context unit tests.

---

## L-001 — here-only lesson

**Status**: active
**Rule**: applies to --here only.
**Category**: subprocess-control
**Applies to**: mmd --here
**Keywords for matching**: alpha

## L-002 — qa-only lesson

**Status**: active
**Rule**: applies to qa only.
**Category**: testing
**Applies to**: mmd qa
**Keywords for matching**: alpha

## L-003 — universal lesson

**Status**: active
**Rule**: applies everywhere.
**Category**: documentation
**Applies to**: *

## L-004 — ship-only lesson, different keyword

**Status**: active
**Rule**: applies to ship only.
